summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Retenue de Garantie (Retention Guarantee) feature for French BTP invoicing. All 21 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified with modal, slider, warranty duration selector, and legal mentions working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created test invoices with retenue de garantie during pytest execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: Retenue de garantie feature fully tested. Max rate is 5% per French law n°75-1334. Warranty durations available: 6, 12, 24 months. Invoices with retenue: FAC-2026-0016 (active), FAC-2026-0013 (released), FAC-2026-0012 (released). Settings page has default retenue configuration section.

tests: ✓ Validation: cannot release already released retention
✓ Validation: cannot release without retention applied
✓ Different warranty durations (6, 12, 24 months) work correctly
✓ Net à payer calculated correctly (TTC - retention amount)
✓ Release date calculated based on warranty months
✓ 'Appliquer' button visible on invoice without retenue
✓ 'Retenue de garantie' section with 'Max 5% - Libérable après garantie' text
✓ Modal opens with correct title 'Appliquer une retenue de garantie'
✓ Preview calculation shows TTC, retention amount, net à payer
✓ 'Retenue de garantie (BTP)' section in Settings page
✓ PDF includes retenue de garantie line in totals section
✓ PDF shows net à payer after retention

mocked_apis_list: Email sending (Resend API - test key re_123_test)
